overall.description: Static first-person view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom looking out through a large window at a rainy, neon-lit futuristic cityscape at night. The scene features heavy rainfall, atmospheric haze, and moody blue-green lighting characteristic of high-end game engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: A static first-person perspective from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom, looking out through a large window at a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The room features a checkered wall pattern and an unmade bed in the foreground, while heavy rain streaks down the glass obscuring the distant neon-lit skyscrapers. The atmosphere is moody and contemplative with mixed indoor and city lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a cyberpunk bedroom that gazes out into a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. It begins within the intimate, moody confines of the room, where a checkered wall pattern and an unmade bed frame the view. As the eye moves toward the large window, the focus shifts to the heavy rain streaking down the glass, which partially obscures the distant skyline. The scene then settles on the contrast between the dim indoor lighting and the vibrant, neon-lit skyscrapers shimmering through the atmospheric haze of the city night.
